results.rendered_html:
vaidala (lī f.) [vidalasya vikāraḥ aṇ] Made of wicker or cane.
— laḥ
1 A kind of cake.
2 Any leguminous vegetable or grain.
— laṃ
1 A shallow cup of a religious mendicant.
2 Any seat or vessel of wickerwork.
